summary: Automated Threshold Alerts feature (11-part spec) fully tested. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Extraction Alert Panel with red left border, severity filter buttons (critical/warning/info), alert cards with all required fields, View Pattern/Dismiss/Resolve buttons, pattern filter URL support, toast notifications, and background evaluation trigger.

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in TableBody - non-critical

critical_code_review_comments: All 7 alert endpoints working correctly with proper response structures
Alert data model includes all required fields: pattern_key, predicted_label, actual_entity_type, severity_level, occurrence_count_7d/30d, trend, trend_pct, affected_vendors, suggested_action, status
Three severity levels (info/warning/critical) computed correctly based on thresholds
Background evaluation runs on startup and creates/updates alerts automatically
Dismiss/Resolve endpoints properly update status and remove from active list
Filter by pattern URL param filters both alerts and patterns tables
Suggested action generated from context-aware templates based on label→entity type combinations
Minor: React key prop warning in vendor table needs fix in LabelCorrectionInsightsPage.js (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 4 corrections for Cargo Modules LLC (PO→SHIPMENT) from iteration_32/33. 1 active alert: PO→posted_sales_shipment with severity='info' (4 occurrences, below warning threshold of 20).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Alert Pattern Service is fully functional. Current active alert: PO→posted_sales_shipment (severity=info, 4 occurrences). Thresholds: warning >= 20 in 7d, critical >= 50 in 30d, vendor critical >= 40% mislabel rate. Pattern key uses Unicode arrow (→ U+2192) - must be URL-encoded for API calls. Background evaluation runs every 600 seconds. Dismiss/resolve endpoints work correctly - dismissed alerts reappear after re-evaluation if pattern still meets threshold criteria.

GET /api/alerts/summary.evidence: Returns total_active=1, critical=0, warning=0, info=1 - all counts correct

GET /api/alerts/active.evidence: Returns array with alert object containing all required fields: pattern_key, predicted_label, actual_entity_type, severity_level, occurrence_count_7d/30d, trend, trend_pct, affected_vendors, suggested_action, status

GET /api/alerts/all.evidence: Returns all alerts without include_resolved param

GET /api/alerts/active?vendor=Cargo%20Mo.evidence: Filters by vendor in affected_vendors or vendor_scope

POST /api/alerts/evaluate.evidence: Returns alerts_created, alerts_updated, alerts_resolved - re-evaluates patterns and updates alert states

POST /api/alerts/{pattern_key}/dismiss.evidence: Returns {status: 'dismissed'}, removes from active list, appears in all with include_resolved

Frontend Extraction Alert Panel.evidence: Shows at top of /label-correction-insights with red left border, severity badge (info), pattern_key, 30d/7d counts, trend with icon, vendors, suggested action in amber box

Frontend severity filter buttons.evidence: critical/warning/info buttons with counts (1) visible, evaluation refresh button functional

Frontend dismiss/resolve actions.evidence: Dismiss removes alert from list with toast, resolve removes with toast - both verified working

Frontend filter by pattern.evidence: ?pattern= URL param displays 'Filters:' badge with pattern key and Clear button, filters both alerts and patterns tables

Background evaluation.evidence: Alert was auto-created during startup evaluation - first_detected timestamp shows automatic creation

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. No mocked integrations.
